Package
Description
neqsim.process.diagnostics
Equipment-level operational diagnostics and root cause analysis.

    Description

    Applies a perturbation to the cloned process matching the hypothesis.

    Creates a not-applied result.
    private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult
    SimulationVerifier.perturbCompressor(Compressor compressor, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
    Applies a compressor perturbation with graduated severity based on failure mode.
    private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult
    SimulationVerifier.perturbCooler(Cooler cooler, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
    Applies a cooler perturbation.

    Applies a heater perturbation.

    SimulationVerifier.perturbHeatExchanger(HeatExchanger heatExchanger, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
    Applies a heat exchanger perturbation.

    Applies a pump perturbation.
